scripts.setup:db: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
scripts.dev: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && turbo dev
scripts.dev:admin: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run dev --workspace=@seleksi/admin
scripts.dev:exam: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run dev --workspace=@seleksi/exam
scripts.dev:pengawas: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run dev --workspace=@seleksi/pengawas
scripts.build:pengawas: npm run db:generate && npm run build --workspace=@seleksi/pengawas
scripts.vercel-build:admin: npm run db:generate && npm run build --workspace=@seleksi/admin
scripts.vercel-build:exam: npm run db:generate && npm run build --workspace=@seleksi/exam
scripts.vercel-build:pengawas: npm run db:generate && npm run build --workspace=@seleksi/pengawas
scripts.setup:local: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
scripts.repair:db: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:reset:local: prisma migrate reset --force && npm run db:seed
